Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ALEGRE HOME CARE, INC.'S Motion By Plaintiff For Order Amending Judgment To Reflect Names Of Defendant
is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open Court. Moving party to prepare an amended judgment. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: C. Herbert/M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/rbu)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers And Responses To Post Judgment Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALEGRE HOME CARE, INC'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS AND RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

Appearances: Peter Henry Liederman (510.681.6916) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

Plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem deciding the motion. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway CSR
#13684.

Robert E. Nuddleman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ALEGRE HOME CARE,
Defaulted defendant WANDA FLUALLEN appearing on her own behalf,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Charles E. Symes, II. sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
A-Alegre Home Care Service Agreement
B-Invoice from 3/8/2014 - 5/8/2015
C-Alegre Home Care Assessment and Care Plan
D-Letter from Charles E. Symes, II 1/9/2015
E-Letter from Defendant 3/12/2015
F-Letter from Charles E. Symes, II 3/13/2015
G-Spreadsheet of payments and interest.
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $145,498.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $56,761.22
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $685.05
Total Judgment in the amount of $202,945.02

Judgment signed in open court.
